# fly_token (Resource)

Manages a Fly.io deploy or org token. Import is not supported; all changes force replacement.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_token" "deploy" {
  type   = "deploy"
  app    = fly_app.example.name
  name   = "ci-deploy-token"
  expiry = "720h"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `type` (String) The token type (e.g., deploy, org). Changing this forces a new resource.

### Optional

- `app` (String) The app name (for deploy tokens). Changing this forces a new resource.
- `expiry` (String) The token expiry duration (e.g., 720h). Changing this forces a new resource.
- `name` (String) The token name. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `org` (String) The organization slug (for org tokens). Changing this forces a new resource.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the token.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) The generated token value.
